warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Subordinate clause word order with 'dass': practice constructing sentences of the pattern 'Ich denke, dass ich [subject] … [verb at end]', paying attention to including an explicit subject and placing the conjugated verb at the very end of the clause.
speaking_prompt: Your room has a problem — the shower is cold or the window won't close. Go to the front desk and explain the issue. Ask if they can fix it or move you to another room.
